title: selaginella densifolia
intro: Selaginella densifolia, also known as the Spikemoss or Resurrection Fern, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella densifolia include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
